content: Doesnt work
Generally any team that is worth their salt has an offensive gameplan
Having some defensive stuff is fine but defense will never win
the objective of the game is still to kill all your enemy units
so you're realistically only stalling until your combo has been set up properly
a decent team can break through whatever you've got built up given enough time (which they don't need a lot of)

From full hp
